tags.markdown:
Week	Date	What key concepts/content will I learn?	Activities/AssignmentsO' week	20/02/2023	Orientation Week	
1	27/02/2023	Introduction to medical science; measurements in medical science	
2	6/03/2023	Safety and hazards in the medical science laboratory 	Task 1a. Online Measurements Quiz
3	13/03/2023	Common laboratory equipment in the medical science laboratory	
Task 1b: Pre-Laboratory Quiz Practical 2

Task 1c: Laboratory Report Practical 2

4	20/03/2023	Laboratory maths and solution preparation 	Census
5	27/03/2023	Human specimen collection (Part 1) and Clinical Laboratory Testing	
Task 1b: Pre-Laboratory Quiz Practical 3

Task 1c: Laboratory Report Practical 3

6*	3/04/2023	Human specimen collection (Part 2) 	Task 1d: Case Study Practical 3
Break - teaching free period	
7	17/04/2023	No topic due to the review quiz 	Task 2: Review Quiz
8*	24/04/2023	Professional ethics in medical science 	
9*	1/05/2023	Techniques and instrumentation in medical science (Part 1) 	
Task 1b: Pre-Laboratory Quiz Practical 4

Task 1c: Laboratory Report Practical 4

10	8/05/2023	 Techniques and instrumentation in medical science (Part 2) 	
11	15/05/2023	 Quality assessment and quality control in medical science (Part 1)	
Task 1b: Pre-Laboratory Quiz Practical 5

Task 1c: Laboratory Report Practical 5

12	22/05/2023	 Quality assessment and quality control in medical science (Part 2)	 
13	29/05/2023	 Careers in medical science: Applying for jobs 	Task 1d. Case Study Practical 4 and 5
5/06/2023	Study Break	
12/06/2023	Exams	Date to be advised in Exam timetable
19/06/2023	Exams	Date to be advised in Exam timetable
*Public holidays: Week 6 Fri 7th April Good Friday; Week 8 Tue 25th April Anzac Day; Week 9 Mon 1st May Labour Day
